Booking - Class in bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.model
Represents a booking in the flight booking system.
Booking(Customer, Flight, LocalDate) - Constructor for class bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.model.Booking
Creates a new Booking with the specified details.
Booking(Customer, Flight, LocalDate, double, double) - Constructor for class bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.model.Booking
Creates a Booking with explicit price and fee values.
Booking(Customer, Flight, LocalDate, double, double, Booking.BookingStatus) - Constructor for class bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.model.Booking
Creates a Booking with all fields including status.
Booking.BookingStatus - Enum in bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.model
Enum representing the status of a booking
BookingDataManager - Class in bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.data
Manages the persistence of booking data.
